title: senecio rufiglandulosus
intro: Senecio rufiglandulosus, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Senecio rufiglandulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
